title: nepeta complanata
intro: Nepeta complanata, also known as catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) characterized by its square stem and grey-green leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nepeta complanata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues such as nausea and irritable bowel syndrome. Nepeta complanata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used in topical applications like salves and creams, making it a versatile plant for various health needs.
